eDrops/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.6 to 3.2.3 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Set the Java source and target version to 21.
Upgrade Kotlin version to 1.9.23 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
Update Kotlin compiler JVM target to 17 (likely a step towards 21 or required by new Kotlin version).
Add thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity6 to support Spring Security 6 integration with Thymeleaf.
Remove explicit hibernate-core dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot Starter Data JPA.
Remove explicit hibernate-testing dependency as it is no longer needed or managed differently.
Add flexmark-all dependency for markdown processing.
Add owasp-java-html-sanitizer for HTML sanitization.
Add MariaDB JDBC driver dependency.
Update H2 database version to 2.2.220.
Change project packaging from war to jar.
Rename groupId from com.sigmondsmart to com.techreier.
Rename artifactId from eDrops to edrops.
Update final build artifact name to edrops.
Add Jib Maven plugin for containerizing the application.
Configure maven-war-plugin to use src/main/resources as war source directory.
Explicitly set the main class for the Spring Boot plugin.
Comment out the 'provided' scope for spring-boot-starter-tomcat, likely to embed Tomcat in the jar.
Comment out the maven-resources-plugin configuration for copying markdown and images.
Comment out the build resources section.

README.md.general_idea: The project was renamed from 'sigmondsmart2' to 'techreier' to reflect a new identity or scope.
README.md.human_impl: Changed header from '# sigmondsmart2' to '# techreier'

README.md.general_idea: The project description was updated from Norwegian to English to match the new project name.
README.md.human_impl: Changed description from 'Sigmondsmart nye websider tillegg' to 'Welcome to Reiers new webpages.'

README.md.general_idea: Links to internal documentation files were added to the README to improve discoverability of project details.
README.md.human_impl: Added links to goals_en.md, readme.md, markdown.md, and databases.md

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.pr.general_idea: Updated the commented-out SSL keystore path to point to a new certificate file.
Changed the commented-out default HTTP port from 8081 to 8080.

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Enable Java 21 virtual threads for improved concurrency performance.
Change the default active profile and database configuration from H2 in-memory to MariaDB.
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl: spring.profiles.active: h2 -> spring.profiles.active: h2 (but default block uses MariaDB URL)

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add multiple Spring profiles for different MariaDB deployment scenarios (local, docker, global).
eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.human_impl: Added profiles: local-mariadb, docker-mariadb, mariadb-dockerized, global-mariadb

eDrops/src/main/resources/application.ya.general_idea: Add a specific profile for H2 file-based persistence.
Externalize application name, user, and password using environment variables with defaults.
Configure Tomcat to allow special characters in paths and queries to prevent 400 errors.
Disable Open Session in View pattern to improve performance and avoid lazy loading issues.
Enable Thymeleaf template caching for production performance.
Set a specific cache period for static web resources.
Update Thymeleaf mode from HTML5 to HTML for better compatibility.
Add detailed logging level and pattern configuration.
Configure server error handling to include stacktraces and exceptions.

eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.general_idea: Added a comprehensive set of internationalization keys for navigation, labels, and UI elements to support the application's structure.
Added specific error messages for input validation, such as empty user IDs and short passwords.
eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.human_impl:
emptyUserid=Userid cannot be empty
shortPassword=Password must be more than 8 characters

eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.general_idea: Added user-friendly text for HTTP status codes to improve error handling display.
Added labels for authentication-related UI components like login, logout, and credentials.
Removed outdated or redundant message keys that are no longer used in the application.
Added a comprehensive set of internationalization keys for navigation, labels, and UI elements to support the application's interface.
Added specific error message keys and HTTP status codes to improve user feedback during failures.
eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.human_impl:
error=Error
errorMessage=Error message
errorText=An error has occured...
400=Bad request
404=Resource not found

eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.general_idea: Added labels and validation messages related to user authentication and login functionality.
eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.human_impl:
login=login
logout=logout
loginError=Wrong username or password
password=Password
username=User
shortPassword=Password must be more than 8 characters

eDrops/src/main/resources/language/messa.general_idea: Added keys for form validation and required field indicators.
Removed outdated or redundant greeting and language selection keys that are no longer used in the new interface structure.

eDrops/src/main/resources/static/css/sty.general_idea: Changed body overflow-x from hidden to auto to allow horizontal scrolling on small screens.
Added vertical margins and padding to paragraph elements for better readability.
Added specific styling for unordered lists and list items including padding and list styles.
Added general table styling including borders, padding, and background colors for headers.
eDrops/src/main/resources/static/css/sty.human_impl: table { border-collapse: collapse; } th { background-color: lightgrey; }

eDrops/src/main/resources/static/css/sty.general_idea: Converted header to flexbox layout with adjusted font size and padding.
eDrops/src/main/resources/static/css/sty.human_impl: header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }

eDrops/src/main/resources/static/css/sty.general_idea: Added specific styles for header link elements like techreier, homebutton, and language selector.
Made images responsive and added a hover tooltip effect using CSS pseudo-elements.
Added a new CSS class for styled link buttons with background color and transitions.
Adjusted padding and margins for the blog entries table cells.
Updated hover styles to include the new dropdown-selected class.
Renamed the dropdown button class to dropdown-item and adjusted its styles.
Added comprehensive styling for the login form, including labels, inputs, and error messages.

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/blog.general_idea: Replace hardcoded HTML lang attribute with a Thymeleaf expression to support internationalization.
Remove explicit UTF-8 meta tag as it is redundant in HTML5.

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.general_idea: Updated HTML head section to use modern meta tags for charset and viewport, replacing legacy http-equiv syntax.
Changed the page title to be more descriptive and specific to the application context.
eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.human_impl: <title>SigmondsSmarts error page that never should appear</title>

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.general_idea: Replaced commented-out layout decorator and generic section structure with a specific header and container div structure.
Replaced hardcoded English text with Thymeleaf internationalization keys for better localization support.
Added conditional blocks to only display error message, exception, and trace details if they are present and not empty.
Added a home button and application branding link to the error page header for better user navigation.
eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.human_impl: <a id="homebutton" th:text="'⌂'" href="/"/> <a id="techreier" th:text="Techreier" href="/"/>

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.general_idea: Standardized indentation and whitespace throughout the HTML file for better readability.
eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/erro.human_impl: Consistent 4-space indentation for all nested elements.

eDrops/src/main/resources/templates/temp.general_idea: Replace hardcoded HTML lang attribute with a dynamic Thymeleaf variable for internationalization support.
Add Spring Security Thymeleaf namespace to enable security-related tags in the template.
Add meta tags for author, description, keywords, and robots to improve SEO.
Add a link to the site's favicon.
Replace static header text with dynamic home links and a language selection form.
Add a visual indicator showing if the user is authenticated using Spring Security.
Replace static blog links with a dynamic list generated from the 'homeDocs' model.
Replace static about links with a dynamic list generated from the 'aboutDocs' model.
Replace static blog list with a dynamic form submitting blog tags/ids from the 'blogs' model.
Add a new admin dropdown menu with login/logout functionality and admin blog management.
Remove the language selection form from the footer and update the copyright text.
Remove the unused 'optional' layout fragment block.

eDrops/src/test/resources/logback-test.x.general_idea: Uncommented the Spring Test logger to enable INFO level logging for test execution.
Updated the logger name to reflect the new package structure (com.techreier.edrops).
Uncommented the Hibernate logger to enable INFO level logging for Hibernate operations.
Reduced the log level for SQL basic binder from TRACE to INFO to decrease verbosity.
Reduced the log level for SQL statements from DEBUG to INFO to decrease verbosity.
